---
title: "Getting Started"
---

Welcome once more ! 

If you are a new user here are a couple of things that will make aimmediatly familiar with what LISSY IS and what is it used for ! 

The next section will informa you if you are allows to register and if so the stpes to follow ! 

Once registered, the following section will teach you how to submit your first job and the functionalities of the interface ! 



## Quick Access 

Here we need to state that in LISSY you will be able to Quick Acess: (a bit to mimic the job submission)

- Load thousands of harmonized datasets for more than 50 countries worldwide. R | Stata



- Using **CPI and PPP deflators** to adjust values expressed in national currencies. [R](/r-users/dh_cont_vars.html#ppp_in_r) | [Stata] ()

- **Data Visualization** in LISSY. [R](/r-users/tidy_plots.html#plots_in_R) | [Stata] ()

- Countries and Years 

- [LIS variables](https://www.lisdatacenter.org/wp-content/uploads/files/data-lis-variables.pdf) and [LWS variables](https://www.lisdatacenter.org/wp-content/uploads/files/data-lws-variables.pdf) 

- [Metadata (METIS)](https://www.lisdatacenter.org/frontend#/home)

- Best Practises in LISSY?
